⚠️ **VALIDATION**: When using $apply, do NOT use $filter, $select, $orderby as separate parameters. These should be included within the $apply expression.

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select specific properties to include in the response. Use comma-separated property names.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: Filter the results based on a boolean condition.

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Order the results by one or more properties. Use 'desc' for descending order.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of items to return (max: 100).

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Number of items to skip before returning results.

parameters.name: $count
parameters.description: Include total count of items in the response.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: Expand related entities inline.

parameters.name: $apply
parameters.description: Apply data aggregation operations like groupby, aggregate. **Use filter() inside apply instead of $filter parameter.**

parameters.name: $compute
parameters.description: Compute new properties as expressions over existing properties.

parameters.name: X-Company-Id
parameters.description: Company context. Priority: route > query > header > org claim.
